scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:packages
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:packages
scripts.build:check: npm run build && node -e "console.log('✅ CommonJS:', require('./dist/slimdown.cjs').render('# Test'))" && node -e "import('./dist/slimdown.mjs').then(m => console.log('✅ ESM:', m.render('# Test')))"
scripts.patch: npm run clean && npm run build && npm version patch --force -m "Patch release" && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.minor: npm run clean && npm run build && npm version minor --force -m "Minor release" && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.major: npm run clean && npm run build && npm version major --force -m "Major release" && npm publish && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:patch: npm run clean && npm run build && npm version patch --workspaces --include-workspace-root --force -m "Patch release" && npm publish --workspaces --include-workspace-root && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run clean && npm run build && npm version minor --workspaces --include-workspace-root --force -m "Minor release" && npm publish --workspaces --include-workspace-root && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run clean && npm run build && npm version major --workspaces --include-workspace-root --force -m "Major release" && npm publish --workspaces --include-workspace-root && git push --follow-tags
